name: Sona
title: Maven of the Strings
shortBio:
- Auras of basic abilities are persistent
- Power Chord (P) does bonus damage
- Crescendo (R) is wider

skins.name: Sweetheart Sona
skins.description: Sona's quiet elegance and mastery of enchanted music might make the heart go all aflutter, but don't be fooled—she can still cut a man in half at thirty paces with her harp's soundwaves. That's the duality of love: sometimes you win, sometimes you get cut in half by soundwaves.

skins.name: Star Guardian Sona

chromas.name: Star Guardian Sona (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Star Guardian Sona (Brilliant)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Star Guardian event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Star Guardian event.

skins.description: Quiet and reflective, Sona spends her time away from the Guardians as a composer of music... and her time with them as a fighter of incredible power, blasting enemies away with sonically charged starlight. Though she cannot speak, she always makes her voice heard through deeds... or her chatterbox familiar-slash-interpreter, Chiizu.

skins.name: Immortal Journey Sona

chromas.name: Immortal Journey Sona (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

skins.description: As a newly immortal member of the Radiant Passion School, Sona's power is in building harmony from dissonance. To her, immortality only comes through finding your shared harmony with your fellow people, and she sees her students as strong notes to be built into immortal chords. It is in this shared passion that makes anything possible.

skins.name: Prestige Immortal Journey Sona
skins.description: A virtuoso artist radiating passion in whatever she does, Sona paused her promising music career to enroll in fashion school. Now a graduate, the Gala is the first showing of her debut line, and Sona is more than happy to let her work do the talking. Unlike her classmates, she has no dreams of becoming immortal through her designs. The journey is enough.

skins.name: Spirit Blossom Springs Sona

chromas.name: Spirit Blossom Springs Sona (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

skins.description: Sona sets the soothing tone for the Kanmei Experience at Spirit Blossom Springs. Her enchanting melodies combined with the sauna's gentle steam can relax any muscle or mind. Her daytime soundbaths never fail to draw a crowd, but it is her exclusive evening shows where her musical prowess can truly be seen—if one is ready, that is.

passive.name: Power Chord
passive.description: After casting 3 spells, Sona's next attack deals bonus magic damage.

spells.name: Hymn of Valor
spells.description: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, granting nearby allied champions bonus Damage and Ability Power. Additionally, casting this ability sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to the nearest two enemy champions or monsters.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Persistent Aura: Increases the Attack Damage and Ability Power of nearby allied Champions by @APADBoost@.

Active: Deals @TotalDamage@ magic damage to the nearest two enemies (prioritizes Champions).@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Aria of Perseverance
spells.description: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, granting nearby allied champions bonus Armor and Magic Resist. Additionally, casting this ability sends out healing melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Persistent Aura: Grants nearby allied Champions @ARMRBoost@ bonus Armor and Magic Resist.

Active: Heals Sona and the most wounded nearby allied Champion for @Healing@ health and grants @ARMRBoost@ additional Armor and Magic Resist for 3 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Song of Celerity
spells.description: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allied champions bonus Movement Speed. Additionally, casting this ability energizes nearby allies with a burst of speed.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Persistent Aura: Grants nearby allied Champions @MSBoost@ bonus Movement Speed.

Active: Grants nearby allies @MoveSpeedMod*100@% Movement Speed for 1.5 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Crescendo
spells.description: Sona plays her ultimate chord, forcing enemy champions to dance and dealing magic damage to them.
spells.dynamicDescription: Strikes an irresistible chord dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> and forcing enemy Champions to <status>dance</status> for 1.5 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
